title: Monster Duke's Daughter
description:
When her mom goes missing, three-year-old Lotilucia stumbles on a magic crest that transports her to the estate of House Frodium, one of the empireÔÇÖs most powerful noble families. Little Lottie immediately recognizes Duke Damian Frodium as her dad; he is the so-called ÔÇ£Monster DukeÔÇØ of demon descent. Once taken into the house, Lottie does her best to stay out of his way. But then she stumbles on a magic book that shows her a story about Duke FrodiumÔÇÖs adopted daughter replacing his dead daughter named Lotilucia! Lottie is shocked but also emboldened by the prophetic tale. If she is meant to die anyway, she might as well be her cheeky self and do as she pleases! This new Lottie wins over her demon dad along with his staff, but will she manage to stay alive and thrive as the Monster DukeÔÇÖs daughter?

---

title: Monster Musume no Iru Nichijou
description:
What do world governments do when they learn that fantastical beings are not merely fiction, but flesh and blood-not to mention feather, hoof, and fang? Why, they create new regulations, of course, like the Interspecies Cultural Exchange Accord! When twenty-something Kimihito Kurusu becomes an involuntary ÔÇ£volunteerÔÇØ in the government homestay program for monster girls, his world is turned upside down.

A lamia named Miia is sent to live with him, and itÔÇÖs KimihitoÔÇÖs job to make sure the sexy snake girl integrates into everyday life. While cold-blooded Miia is hot for Kimihito, the penalties for interspecies breeding are dire. Even worse, when a buxom centaur girl, and a scantily-clad harpy move into KimihitoÔÇÖs house, whatÔÇÖs a full-blooded young man with raging hormones to do?

title: Game Sekai de Mamono ni Tensei Shite Shimatta Ore, Zense de Oshi Datta Heroine wo Hirotte Shimau
description:
When I woke up, I had reincarnated into the world of a game I played in my past life. And what's more, as a monster that's hostile to humanity! It couldn't be helped, so I just lived quietly so humans wouldn't find me, but...

The heroine, Noa, who was my oshi in my past life, was collapsed near my home!!

After I protected and nursed her, my oshi gave me the name "Rei", so I decided to protect my oshi for life and follow Noa. I meet other characters from the game too, and I'm watching over Noa's growth, but... the real Noa seems to be the type who's a bit clingy and has a... "heavy" love?

This is the story of me, reincarnated as a monster, somehow overcoming hardships together with my beloved oshi.

title: Funerals for the Damned
description: It all begins with a meteor shower. Soon after, reports spread of so-called Immortals. Each time they die, their bodies reset to an earlier point in time, with every wound, scar, and even the smallest scratch gone. Humanity is thrown into chaos, unable to explain the strange phenomenon. Two hundred years later, scientists still haven't been able to uncover the mystery of immortality. The Immortals now live in hiding: hunted, captured, and exploited as test subjects. They are forced to live, unable to die. Then, a rumor begins to spread of a man known only as the UndertakerÔÇö the one who can kill the Immortals.

title: Monster Onna Kanbu wa Osanaki Yuusha wo Dekiaisuru
description: When a young hero appears, Arachne is ordered to hunt him down, and is moved by the hero's attitude and falls in love with him. On the contrary, she wants to use the power of the young hero to become the strongest demon...

title: Makutsu no Ou ~Yomei Ikkagetsu no Doutei, Mahou Shoujo Harem wo Kizuite Ou e Kunrinsu~
description:
After being transported to another world and wandering a forest inhabited by monsters, Shimizu Shouichi's life is saved by a cute fairy called Ami. He is given the skills to survive in the other world, but in exchange, he has to make a girl climax once a month or he will die!

Shouichi, who has no experience with women, is hesitant at first, but Ami's skillful conversation skills lead him to become honest about the desires hidden deep within his heart... If he doesn't have sex with a magical girl, he will die!?

title: "Ano Toki Tasukete Itadaita Monster Musume desu." Isekai Ossan Kyoushi Totsuzen no Moteki ni Konwaku suru
description: Some 20 years have passed since the protagonist was summoned to another world and retired from the army. He is still single in his 40s and lives as a low-ranking professor, until one day, an elite "monster girl" transfers into his class.

title: The Monstrous Duke's Adopted Daughter
description:
LeslieÔÇÖs life as the youngest daughter of the Sperado noble family was always used for the betterment of her sister, Eli, who is betrothed to the Crown Prince of the kingdom. After a failed attempt to extract the black magic within Leslie by sacrificing her to transfer it to Eli, Leslie knocks on the door of the monster Duchess Salvatore and, battered, bruised and desperate, pleads for the Duchess to adopt her?!

---

The Sper├ádo family line possesses a secret: shadow magic. But it's been 100 years since someone last wielded it. When Marquis Sper├ádo tries to sacrifice Leslie for her favored sister Ellie, little does he know that this awakens the power of darkness in her instead. To escape her family's greed and abuse, Leslie's out to make a deal with the Monstrous Duke: adopt her, and her powers will be at the duke's disposal. Will Leslie escape her parents' cruel grip, or succumb to their evil exploits?

---

**Note:** Chapter 130 is marked by the author as the end of the main story, and Chapters 131 to 150 is listed as an epilogue and flashback-origin story for Duchess Salvatore and her family.

---

- [Alternative Raw (Kakao Webtoon)](https://webtoon.kakao.com/content/%EA%B4%B4%EB%AC%BC-%EA%B3%B5%EC%9E%91%EA%B0%80%EC%9D%98-%EA%B3%84%EC%95%BD-%EA%B3%B5%EB%85%80/2336)

title: Monster in the Lake Village
description: The story is set in the Nanling Mountains during the turn of the century (roughly late 1990s to early 2000s). It focuses on local folklore, urban legends, and supernatural strange tales from that specific region.

title: Tsuihou Sareta Renkinjutsushi, Adult Goods de Sekai wo Sukuu ~Donna Monster mo Zettai ni Ikaseru Otoko~
description:
**You've been making... nothing but adult toys?!**

Oruga Zumu, a man whose alchemy always turns everything into adult toys, is expelled from his party for **lowering the status.** However, the female knight Kuu Korosse, who appears before him, recognizes Oruga's true power.

title: Monster Hunter: Flash Hunter
description:
In an era where Monsters dominate the sky, earth, and sea, a race of ÔÇ£HuntersÔÇØ emergeÔÇª Equipped with an arsenal of special equipment, they hunt their gigantic prey according to quests given out by a Guild.  
  
Although a novice, Raiga is a young Hunter who is reckless and persistent. With a headstrong nature, he will have to cooperate with Keres and Torcche, an archer and a swordswoman with complementary capabilitiesÔÇª but with completely opposite characters! Together, the group launches into hunts of creatures more ferocious than the ones before, including the Rathian, the legendary ÔÇ£Queen of the LandÔÇØ.  
(From: MU)

title: Kyuuseishu ┬½Messiah┬╗: Isekai o Sukutta Motoyuusha ga Mamono no Afureru Genjitsu Sekai o Musou Suru
description: The **former** savior, Takeru Yamato, was summoned to another world and executed because of his strength. When he wakes up, he finds himself in Japan, where he spent time before being summoned. However, in the city, demons appear from "gates" and rampage, and those called hunters fight them using magic. Returning from another world, Takeru decides to hide his powers and live, but...

title: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki ~Geboku no Youkaidomo ni Kurabete Monster ga Yowai Sugirundaga~
description:
Haruyoshi Kuga's power as the strongest exorcist is all for naught when he is betrayed by his closest ally. With his dying breath, he casts the secret Spell of Reincarnation ÔÇö when he next opens his eyes, he finds himself in a different world altogether, reincarnated as Seika Lamprogue, the son of a family of magic scholars! He quickly learns that the magic in this new world is quite unlike the sorcery he learned in his past life and that he can't use it. Fortunately for him, with his mastery of curses and the hordes of youkai at his disposal, he doesn't need to. 

Haruyoshi (now Seika) is determined not to repeat his past mistakes in his second life by smartly laying low and avoiding flaunting his power. Yet accomplishing his goals and without drawing attention to himself proves to be easier said than done ÔÇö will his powers be enough to live a happy life?!
___
[Official English Light Novel](https://j-novel.club/series/the-reincarnation-of-the-strongest-exorcist-in-another-world)

title: Maou ni Natta node, Dungeon Tsukutte Jingai Musume to Honobono Suru
description:
Before I realized, I had become the guardian of a dungeon, a Demon Lord. I was suddenly in a dangerous world with giant monsters loitering around, fighting for their existence. So I thought to go about developing the dungeon in order to not die, but for some reason I was having quite the good time... How did it turn out like this?  
  
The protagonist, Yuki, having to live in that world now, uses his bold and sharp senses and spends time with a supreme dragon girl and a vampire girl, sometimes laughing, sometimes being angry, passing days doing what he likes.

title: Pok├®mon SPECIAL - Sun & Moon
description:
Sun dreams of money. Moon dreams of science. When their paths cross with Team Skull, both their plans go awry.  
  
Moon is on her way to deliver a rare Pok├®mon to Professor Kukui in the Alola region when she meets his good friend Sun, a courier entrusted with a special Pok├®dex. Sun offers to safely deliver Moon to the professorÔÇÖs labÔÇªbut then they tangle with a group of grunts from Team Skull and are attacked by a mysterious Pok├®mon!  
  
What does the mysterious Pok├®mon leave in its wakeÔÇª?

title: Shokubutsu Monster Musume Nikki ~Seijo datta Watashi ga Uragirareta Hate ni Aruraune ni Tensei Shite Shimatta node, kore kara wa Kougousei wo Shinagara Shizuka ni Shokubutsu Life wo Sugoshimasu~
description:
Who knew that even a stationary plant could be surprisingly capable?!

Our protagonist is a saintÔÇöor was, until she was betrayed by one of her fellow saint apprentices as well as her fianc├®, a hero. 
In her final moments, she recalls her previous life, when she was just a normal Japanese high school girl, but that doesn't help the fact that she's being eaten alive by a massive plant monster.

And yet, by a stroke of luck, she doesn't die for good, but instead reincarnates as said plant monster. With the upper half of a human and the lower half of a plant, she must now spend her life as an Alraune.

And so, she tries to live the peaceful life of a plant, photosynthesizing all day!
Welcome to the diary of a plant girl who just wants some peace and quiet, but something always gets in her way!

*(Series has been on hiatus since July 2024)*

[web novel](https://ncode.syosetu.com/n4444ge/) (jp)

---

title: Kamakura Bakeneko Club
description: There exists an old rumor relating to cats within the ancient capital of Kamakura... that if you go to the "Bakeneko Club", located somewhere in Kamakura, you can meet cats that have gone missing. Even today, people wander into "Kamakura Neko Club", where Maya and Gakuto work, relying on this rumor.

title: Kaijin Mira no Dai 2 Keitai ga Kawaisugiru
description:
Cuteness is unbeatable!

Monster Mira is on another rampage, aiming to steal the hero's transformation belt. Having just reached full power thanks to the Doctor's modifications, Mira's new form turns out to be way too cute!

title: Isekai Summoner, Shinwa no Kaibutsu-tachi to Gendai de Musou Suru: Uragirareta Moto Eiyuu wa, Aiomome na Nakama to Heiwa ni Kurashitai
description:
Reima, a Summoner, was transported to another world where he defeated the Demon King and became a hero of the people. But his power, great enough to even slay the Demon King, came to be feared as a threat to humanity ÔÇö leading to his execution.

Bidding a silent farewell in his heart to the summoned beasts who fought at his side, he thought his life had endedÔÇª yet he awoke in a hospital in Japan. 

"I don't want to worry my summoned companions anymore..."

With the strongest summoned beast ÔÇö whose love for him borders on terrifying ÔÇö at his side, Reima must now protect humanity from the onslaught of the gods!

title: Jingai Kenshi wa Chikara ni Miserare Ura Meikyuu wo Kouryaku su ~Bakemono Atsukai sareta Moto Boukensha wa, Jibun dake ga Shiru Meikyuu de Hitome wo Ki ni Sezu Musou suru~
description:
Jin is an adventurer so overwhelmingly strong that he can cut down a three-headed dragon with a single slash! Though he craves more power, he fears that becoming any stronger would turn him into a monster... so he retires from adventuring and returns to his hometown caf├®, in Dagar! However, in the mountains behind his family home lies a dungeon said to grant oneÔÇÖs deepest desires...?!

Together with Shuna, a runaway saint who suddenly barges into his life, the power-hungry former adventurer sets out to conquer the dangerous, monster-filled dungeon! And after the battles, they savor exquisite dungeon cuisine made from the monsters they defeatÔÇö?!
